name: Holo Atlas
summary: A live map of every app — discover, verify and monitor the whole OS by its verified identity.

description.p: You can trust a directory ranked by content; you can't trust one ranked by popularity.
Every holospace's identity is its content address (did:holo), so the map shows verifiable truth each entry re-derives to prove it is genuine (Law L5).

ul: A constellation graph and searchable directory of every holospace
Identity is the content hash no registry to trust
Discover, verify and monitor the whole OS in one place

releases.description: The content-addressed community map: live discovery from the app index, a force-directed closure-graph constellation plus a searchable directory, per-app live κ re-derivation (Law L5), agent-door coverage, all sealed as one re-derivable atlas κ.
